**Describe the addition or correction**
Please do not report problems running Star Citizen here; this form is for proposing additions or corrections to the Wiki.  
For problems running Star Citizen, see the links to community support listed on our wiki:  
https://wiki.starcitizen-lug.org/

**Relevant wiki section links**
Link to the section of the wiki where additions or corrections are needed.

**Additional context**
Any other context or information about the additions or corrections.
